case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. FABIO EDUARDO COCENTINO SEGUNDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SEGUNDO, FABIO EDUARDO COCENTINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEGUNDO, FABIO EDUARDO COCENTINO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FABIO EDUARDO COCENTINO SEGUNDO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGUNDO, FABIO EDUARDO COCENTINO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
